5 sopas de diferentes países para provar; com receitas
content: Sopa de abóbora 5 sopas de diferentes países para provar; com receitas De receitas simples e tradicionais a pratos que se tornaram símbolos da gastronomia internacional, as sopas carregam histórias, costumes e ingredientes típicos de diferentes países. Que tal conhecer algumas versões ao redor do mundo? Borscht, sopa de beterraba do Restaurante Barsiky Dom Borscht (Rússia) Tradicional em países do Leste Europeu, o Borscht é conhecido pela coloração intensa da beterraba, ingrediente principal da receita. A sopa pode ser consumida quente ou fria e leva vegetais como repolho, cenoura, batata e cebola, além de versões com carne e creme azedo. Receita completa Receita de caldo verde Caldo verde (Portugal) Muito popular no norte de Portugal, o caldo verde é presença frequente em festas e celebrações tradicionais. A receita combina couve galega, batata, alho, cebola e linguiça, geralmente acompanhados de broa ou pão de milho. Receita completa Sopa de cebola do ICI Brasserie Sopa de cebola (França) Criada a partir de ingredientes acessíveis, a sopa de cebola francesa ganhou sofisticação ao longo do tempo com a adição de vinho e caldo de carne. O prato costuma ser servido com pão tostado e queijo gratinado, formando uma camada dourada e cremosa. Receita completa Minestrone, clássica sopa italiana Minestrone (Itália) O minestrone é uma sopa tradicional italiana ligada à culinária camponesa e preparada de acordo com os ingredientes disponíveis em cada estação. Sem uma receita única, o prato ganha versões diferentes em cada região da Itália. Receita completa SÃO PAULO 17/04/2024 PALADAR RECEITAS FEITAS NO MIXER - Receitas feitas no mixer no sesc santo amaro SOPA FRIA PAZPACHO FOTO ALEX SILVA/ESTADÃO Gaspacho (Espanha) Originário da Andaluzia, no sul da Espanha, o gaspacho é uma sopa fria preparada com tomate, pepino, pimentão, alho e azeite de oliva. Refrescante e leve, costuma ser servido com pedaços de pão crocante e vegetais picados. Receita completa Mão ligando o queimador a gás no fogão da cozinha. Mais opções no Paladar Gostou? title: Ιθάκη: Έρευνες για δύο τουρίστες που εξαφανίστηκαν στην Βίγγλα
content: Σε εξέλιξη είναι οι έρευνες των αρχών στην Ιθάκη , για τους δύο τουρίστες που εξαφανίστηκαν στην ευρύτερη περιοχή της Βίγγλας και του Αγίου Νικολάου, χωρίς μέχρι στιγμής να έχουν βρεθεί ίχνη τους. Σύμφωνα με το kefaloniafocus , οι δύο τουρίστες έστειλαν το απόγευμα της Τρίτης (18/5/26) ένα μήνυμα, δίνοντας το στίγμα του κινητού τηλεφώνου τους στην περιοχή του Αγίου Νικολάου στην Ιθάκη και από εκείνη τη στιγμή δεν έδωσαν άλλο σημείο ζωής, με την ανησυχία να έχει χτυπήσει «κόκκινο». Στις έρευνες συμμετέχουν δύο ομάδες διασωστών που έκαναν εκτεταμένη αναζήτηση σε μονοπάτια, χαράδρες και δύσβατα σημεία, χωρίς όμως αποτέλεσμα. Οι ίδιες πηγές αναφέρουν ότι ενδεχομένως ο ένας από τους δύο τουρίστες να έχει τραυματιστεί στο πόδι. Οι έρευνες συνεχίζονται... Entre el duelo y el amor: hija de Carlos Batista Matos sorprende al anunciar su boda en Miami
content: Santo Domingo.- Belkis Marie Batista, hija de la reconocida merenguera Belkis Concepción y del fallecido periodista Carlos Batista Matos, anunció que contrajo matrimonio con su pareja, Isabella Espinal, en una ceremonia civil celebrada en Miami. La psicoterapeuta dio a conocer la noticia a través de su cuenta de Instagram este domingo, donde compartió un video con algunos de los momentos más emotivos del enlace, realizado el pasado 11 de mayo. En la publicación, Belkis Marie expresó la felicidad que vive junto a su ahora esposa y agradeció el respaldo de sus seres queridos. “Que el futuro nos encuentre agarradas de las manos. Para siempre nuestra historia de amor más bonita”, escribió junto a las imágenes de la boda. También dedicó palabras de agradecimiento a familiares y amigos cercanos que las acompañaron durante la celebración. La pareja aprovechó además la conmemoración del Día Internacional contra la Homofobia, la Transfobia y la Bifobia para enviar un mensaje de visibilidad y defensa de los derechos de la comunidad LGBTQ+. Belkis Marie señaló que vivir libremente y sin miedo continúa siendo una forma de lucha en sociedades donde aún persisten barreras legales y sociales. Recomendamos leer: Hijos de Carlos Batista Matos despiden a su padre con emotivo homenaje en su funeral “Hoy es día de la lucha contra la homofobia y la mejor forma de hacerlo es viviendo la vida que te da la gana vivir. Sin pedir perdón ni pedir permiso”, expresó en su publicación. Asimismo, lamentó que en República Dominicana todavía no exista el reconocimiento legal del matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo, aunque afirmó que continuarán levantando su voz para impulsar cambios en favor de la igualdad. La boda se produce a pocas semanas del fallecimiento de Carlos Batista Matos, una de las figuras más emblemáticas de la comunicación dominicana, quien murió el pasado 13 de abril a los 75 años de edad a causa de un infarto. Su partida generó múltiples reacciones en el ámbito artístico y televisivo del país.

title: Delhi Capitals Eye Playoff Spot with KL Rahul and Young Talents
content: Delhi Capitals Gear Up for Crucial IPL Match New Delhi [India] - As the IPL 2026 season approaches its climax, the Delhi Capitals (DC) are poised to make a significant effort to secure a playoff position. The spotlight is on KL Rahul, who has emerged as the franchise's top run-scorer this season, amassing 533 runs. DC's roster features promising uncapped Indian hitters like Abishek Porel and Sahil Parakh, both of whom have caught Rahul's attention with their bold playing style. In a recent discussion on JioStar's 'Superstars', DC's wicketkeeper-batter praised Abhishek Porel, stating, "His capability to hit sixes and utilize every corner of the field is remarkable. The newcomers are all versatile batters. Abhishek can clear long-on with his first ball or scoop over fine leg right away." Rahul noted, "Such versatility is rare, even among seasoned players. It's one thing to consider executing those shots, but what sets the new players apart, particularly Abhishek, is their ability to perform under pressure against top bowlers and formidable teams." Porel, aged 23, has scored 86 runs in three matches this season, averaging 28. Rahul attributes Porel's success to his rigorous training and preparation prior to matches. "He doesn't require time to acclimatize. He approaches every situation fearlessly, focusing solely on the ball. The credit goes to their training and readiness for such a major competition. This mindset is uncommon in young players. His confidence in his skills is why he is thriving. Abhishek Porel exemplifies this bold new generation," Rahul remarked. Meanwhile, 18-year-old Sahil Parakh made his IPL debut this year and is recognized for his explosive left-handed batting style. He is a natural boundary hitter who excels at taking on pace bowlers during the powerplay. Discussing the 'fearless prodigy' Parakh, Rahul shared, "I first noticed Sahil a week before TATA IPL 2026 during our practice camp. I came across a video from a training session in Hyderabad where he was hitting sixes consistently. I thought, 'Who is this player?' I was aware we had selected someone named Sahil and had seen clips of him in the Maharashtra League. However, witnessing him in action at the camp was even more impressive. He is incredibly dynamic." Currently, DC is positioned seventh in the points table with six victories and seven defeats. They must secure a win against the Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) on Sunday to keep their playoff hopes alive.

Cocina eficiente: qué mirar antes de renovar los electrodomésticos que más usas en casa
content: Elegir bien los artefactos de cocina no depende solo del precio o del tamaño. La eficiencia energética, el espacio disponible y los hábitos diarios también pesan al momento de tomar una decisión útil para la casa. La cocina suele ser uno de los lugares más usados del hogar. Ahí se guardan alimentos, se preparan comidas rápidas, se calientan platos y se organizan buena parte de las rutinas familiares. Por eso, cuando llega el momento de renovar un electrodoméstico, conviene mirar más allá de la primera impresión. Un aparato puede verse moderno, tener muchas funciones o parecer cómodo por fuera, pero no siempre será el más adecuado para el uso diario. La clave está en elegir según necesidad real, consumo, capacidad y espacio disponible , especialmente cuando se trata de equipos que se usan todos los días o varias veces por semana. La eficiencia no es solo un tema de ahorro La etiqueta de eficiencia energética ayuda a comparar el consumo de distintos artefactos antes de elegir. No reemplaza otros criterios, pero entrega una señal clara sobre cuánto podría gastar un equipo durante su uso normal. Esto importa especialmente en la cocina, donde algunos aparatos permanecen conectados todo el tiempo y otros concentran mucho uso en pocos minutos. Un electrodoméstico eficiente no siempre es el más barato al inicio, pero puede ser más conveniente si acompaña mejor la rutina de la casa . También sirve mirar funciones que realmente se van a ocupar. A veces, un equipo con muchas opciones termina usando más espacio del necesario o incorpora características que casi nunca se aprovechan. ¿Qué conviene revisar antes de elegir un equipo de cocina? Antes de renovar, vale la pena hacerse preguntas simples. Cuántas personas viven en la casa, cuánto se cocina, qué espacio hay disponible y qué tan seguido se almacenan alimentos frescos o preparaciones listas. Criterio Por qué importa Qué revisar Tamaño Evita comprar algo que no cabe o queda justo Alto, ancho, fondo y ventilación Capacidad Debe calzar con el uso real Litros, distribución interior y cantidad de personas Consumo Puede influir en el gasto mensual Etiqueta energética y modo de uso Funciones No todas se usan a diario Programas, potencia y facilidad de limpieza Mantención Afecta la vida útil del equipo Limpieza, ubicación y cuidados básicos Medir antes de elegir parece obvio, pero es uno de los errores más comunes. En cocinas pequeñas o departamentos, unos pocos...

Asian FX Under Dual Pressure From Oil Shock and Rising US Yields, MUFG Warns
content: BitcoinWorld Asian FX Under Dual Pressure From Oil Shock and Rising US Yields, MUFG Warns Asian foreign exchange markets are facing mounting pressure from two powerful headwinds: a sharp rise in global oil prices and persistently elevated US Treasury yields, according to a new analysis from MUFG Bank. The warning comes as several import-dependent economies in the region grapple with a deteriorating external environment that threatens to weaken their currencies further. Oil Shock Compounds Import Costs The recent surge in crude oil prices, driven by supply constraints and geopolitical tensions, is hitting Asian importers particularly hard. Countries such as India, South Korea, Japan, and Thailand rely heavily on imported energy to fuel their industries and power their households. As oil prices climb, these nations must spend more foreign exchange reserves to purchase the same volume of crude, widening their trade deficits and putting downward pressure on their currencies. MUFG’s analysts note that the correlation between oil price movements and Asian FX performance has strengthened in recent weeks. The bank’s models suggest that for every 10% increase in Brent crude, currencies like the Indian rupee and the Korean won could depreciate by an additional 1-2% against the US dollar, all else being equal. US Yields Tighten Financial Conditions At the same time, US Treasury yields have remained elevated as markets adjust expectations for Federal Reserve monetary policy. Higher US yields attract capital flows into dollar-denominated assets, reducing demand for emerging market currencies. This dynamic is particularly challenging for Asian central banks, which must balance the need to support their currencies with the risk of stifling domestic growth. The combination of higher oil costs and tighter financial conditions creates a classic ‘twin shock’ scenario for Asian FX markets. MUFG emphasizes that the region’s vulnerability is heightened by slowing global demand and ongoing uncertainty over trade policies. What This Means for Investors and Businesses For businesses operating in Asia, the weakening currency environment raises the cost of importing raw materials and servicing dollar-denominated debt. Exporters may benefit from a weaker domestic currency, but the overall drag on economic activity from higher energy costs could offset those gains. Investors, meanwhile, face increased volatility and may need to reassess their exposure to Asian assets. MUFG’s analysis...

Posadas: Cuatro ladrones detenidos, tras un intento de robo con cuchillo y un arma de utilería
content: Sobre las últimas horas del domingo, cuatro hombres fueron detenidos en Posadas, luego de un intento de robo ocurrido sobre avenida Cabo de Hornos. La intervención policial permitió además el secuestro de un arma blanca y una réplica de arma de fuego utilizadas para amedrentar a la víctima durante el ilícito, nada menos. Todo comenzó, cuando un hombre de 48 años manifestó que se dirigía a un kiosco ubicado sobre avenida Cabo de Hornos y calle 57 B, momento en que fue interceptado por un delincuente armado con un objeto punzocortante que intentó sustraerle sus pertenencias. Según relató la víctima, vecinos de la zona advirtieron la situación y acudieron rápidamente en su ayuda, logrando reducir al agresor hasta la llegada de los efectivos policiales . El implicado, de 32 años, fue inmediatamente demorado en el lugar. Mientras se desarrollaba el procedimiento, otros tres hombres arribaron con intenciones de facilitar la fuga del detenido, agrediendo al damnificado y entorpeciendo el accionar policial. Tras un operativo de recorridas en inmediaciones, los efectivos lograron detener a los restantes involucrados de 27, 29 y 32 años, todos varones. Durante las detenciones, los uniformados secuestraron un cuchillo y un arma de fuego tipo réplica o de utilería, elementos que habrían sido utilizados para intimidar a la víctima durante el intento de robo. Los cuatro detenidos fueron trasladados a sede policial, quedando a disposición de la Justicia. La entrada Posadas: Cuatro ladrones detenidos, tras un intento de robo con cuchillo y un arma de utilería se publicó primero en Primera Edición .

title: Samsunspor’dan Galatasaray’a çifte transfer hamlesi: Nelsson ve Kazımcan Karataş listede
content: Yeni sezon öncesi iddialı bir kadro kurmak isteyen Samsunspor, gözünü Galatasaray’a dikti. Kırmızı-Beyazlılar, Sarı-Kırmızılı ekibin savunma oyuncuları Victor Nelsson ve Kazımcan Karataş’ı renklerine bağlamak için harekete geçiyor. Samsunspor'da hedef Galatasaray’dan iki isim Trendyol Süper Lig’de gelecek sezon iddialı bir konumda yer almak isteyen Samsunspor, transfer piyasasında ses getirecek hamleler için düğmeye bastı. Karadeniz temsilcisi, savunma hattını güçlendirmek adına Galatasaray’dan Danimarkalı stoper Victor Nelsson ve sol bek Kazımcan Karataş’ı listesine aldı. Resmi teklif kapıda: Girişimler başlıyor Kırmızı-Beyazlılar, Galatasaray kulübüne henüz resmi bir teklifte bulunmadı. Ancak Samsunspor yönetiminin transfer stratejisini belirlediği ve önümüzdeki günlerde İstanbul devinin kapısını çalacağı öğrenildi. İki oyuncunun transfer şartlarını masaya yatıracak olan Samsunspor, kısa süre içinde resmi girişimleri başlatmayı planlıyor. Victor Nelsson küme düştü! İtalya Serie A'ya veda ettiler Sezon başında Galatasaray'dan ayrılmak isteyen Victor Nelsson, İtalya Serie A ekibi Verona'ya kiralanmıştı. Danimarkalı savunmacının formasını giydiği Verona, Serie B'ye düştü. Victor Nelsson, bu sezon İtalyan ekibinde forma giydiği 33 karşılaşmada gol ya da asist katkısı sağlayamadı. Kazımcan Karataş'ın performansı Devre arası transfer döneminde Galatasaray'dan RAMS Başakşehir'e kiraık olarak transfer olan Kazımcan Karataş ise 11 maçta forma giydi, 2 asist kaydetti.

Turhal'da Taşkın Riskine Karşı Tahliyeler Başladı
content: Turhal'da Taşkın Riski Nedeniyle Tahliyeler Başlatıldı Tokat iline bağlı Turhal ilçesinde, artan sel ve taşkın tehlikesi nedeniyle bazı mahalleler ile köylerde acil tahliye kararı alındı. Alınan Tahliye Kararları Turhal Afet Koordinasyon Kurulu tarafından alınan karar doğrultusunda, 15 mahalle ve 7 köyün risk altındaki bölgeleri geçici olarak boşaltılacak. Bu kapsamda; Müftü, Kazımkarabekir, Pazar, Meydan, Fatih, Varvara, Hamam, Borsa, Çevlikler, Hacılar, Celal, Yunus Emre, Yavuz Selim, Camikebir ve Kova mahalleleri ile Kızkayası, Arapören, Elalmış, Sütlüce, Şatroba, Tatlıcak ve Samurçay köylerinin taşkından etkilenmesi muhtemel alanları tahliye edilecek. Veriler ve Koordinasyon Devlet Su İşleri Genel Müdürlüğü ve Meteoroloji Genel Müdürlüğü verilerine göre, Almus Barajı ndaki su seviyesinin kritik bir düzeye ulaştığı, 19 Mayıs Salı gecesi veya 20 Mayıs Çarşamba sabahı dolusavaklardan taşma olasılığının bulunduğu belirtildi. Uyarılar ve Çalışmalar Bölgedeki otoriteler; AFAD , belediye, jandarma, emniyet ve DSİ ekiplerinin birlikte çalışarak gerekli tedbirleri aldığını duyurdu. Vatandaşların dere yataklarından uzak durmaları ve resmi kurumların uyarılarını dikkate almaları istendi. TOKAT’IN TURHAL İLÇESİNDE SEL VE TAŞKIN RİSKİ NEDENİYLE KENT MERKEZİ İLE BAZI KÖYLERDE TAHLİYE KARARI ALINDI. TURHAL AFET KOORDİNASYON KURULU TARAFINDAN ALINAN KARAR DOĞRULTUSUNDA 15 MAHALLE İLE 7 KÖYÜN RİSK ALTINDAKİ BÖLÜMLERİNİN GEÇİCİ OLARAK BOŞALTILACAĞI BİLDİRİLDİ.

Thunderbirds Roar Over South Beach In Memorial Day Air And Sea Spectacle
content: Miami Beach is set to turn Memorial Day weekend into a full‐throttle spectacle as the Hyundai Air & Sea Show storms back to South Beach this Saturday and Sunday, May 23–24. The big headliner this year: the U.S. Air Force Thunderbirds, making their first‐ever appearance over Miami Beach. The show is free, expected to draw serious crowds, and prime viewing will go fast, so early birds get the best spot in the sand. According to the HYUNDAI Air & Sea Show , the event will showcase personnel and equipment from all six branches of the U.S. military, plus a mix of military flyovers, offshore powerboats and hands‐on activations along Ocean Drive. The official site confirms the Thunderbirds as the marquee aerial act and lays out options for hospitality and viewing clubs if you want shade, upgraded seating or a bit of distance from the crowds. What To Watch And Where To Stand The main program is scheduled to run roughly 11 a.m. to 4:30 p.m., with the Patriot Display Village and food stands opening earlier along Ocean Drive. Recommended beach viewing zones stretch from 1st through 10th streets and from 13th through 20th streets, as outlined by the City of Miami Beach . In between those blocks, expect some of the densest crowds and best sightlines. Getting There And Parking Organizers strongly suggest getting in early and using rideshare to avoid gridlock. Drivers are urged to have drop‐offs end along Washington Avenue, then walk the two blocks east to the park and beach. If you are doing transit instead of traffic, options include a Metrobus from Downtown that takes about 30 minutes to Washington & 11th, plus the free, air‐conditioned Miami Beach Trolley circulating around the city. Aerial performances generally kick off around 11:30 a.m., according to NBC6 South Florida , so plan your arrival if you want to be settled before the jets roar in. Patriot Display Village And Family Plans The Florida Power & Light Patriot Display Village will line Ocean Drive between 11th and 14th Streets, packed with simulators, equipment displays and a dedicated children’s activity zone. As noted by Miami & Beaches , food and beverage concessions will be available through the middle of the day, and many of the most family‐friendly activities will be centered around Lummus Park. What To Bring And Safety Tips Between the blazing sun and screaming engines, this is not the day to pack light. Officials recommend sunscreen, refillable water bottles and ear protection for anyone sensitive to...

1 Canadian Stock With “Multi-Bagger” Potential Over 5 Years
content: The multi-bagger: itâ€TMs what every investor dreams about. Buying a stock and seeing it just surge year after year, and you become the person everyone talks about for â€œbuying it back when.â€ The thing is, how on earth are you supposed to find that multi-bagger? And when do you sell? The key is to find a stock that combines a large growth runway with a valuation that doesnâ€TMt fully price in that runway yet. The best five-year winners usually have expanding revenue, improving profitability, a clear competitive edge, and a business model that can scale without needing constant reinvention. While not a guarantee, the business can have enough growth, earnings power, and investor interest to possibly look much larger five years from now. EQB Thatâ€TMs why today weâ€TMre looking at EQB ( TSX:EQB ), known as Canadaâ€TMs Challenger Bank, and the label fits now that itâ€TMs the seventh largest bank in Canada. EQB stock offers residential lending, commercial lending, deposits, banking services, and wealth management. Most recently, EQB stock had $138 billion in combined assets under management (AUM) and administration at the end of fiscal 2025. Yet its market cap recently sat around $4.2 billion, a fraction of the Big Six banks. The numbers just donâ€TMt fit the story. EQB stock deposits reached nearly $10 billion at the end of fiscal 2025, up 10% year over year. Its customer base reached 607,000, up 18% year over year. EQB stock also spent the last year dealing with credit pressure and cost control, and the turnaround is beginning to show. Into earnings In Q1 2026, EQB stock reported adjusted revenue of $306.8 million. Adjusted pre-provision pre-tax earnings came in at $156.2 million, up 9% from the prior quarter. Adjusted return on equity improved to 11.1%, up 360 basis points from Q4. The efficiency ratio also improved to 49.1%. Thatâ€TMs a key number as it shows costs consumed less than half of revenue. The year-over-year picture still shows pressure, however. Adjusted diluted earnings per share (EPS) fell 24% from the prior year. Adjusted net income fell 27% from the prior year, so EQB stock hasnâ€TMt fully escaped the credit cycle. Still, the quarter-over-quarter improvement suggests the worst may be easing. Meanwhile, the company still trades at 19 times earnings, with a 2% dividend yield. That alone can create a strong income, even from $7,000. Aviso epidemiológico por Hantavirus y Ébola: vigilancia por posibles casos importados
content: Redacción GMN | Piedras Negras, Coah.- Aunque son enfermedades que se han registrado en locaciones remotas, la Jurisdicción Sanitaria 01 ha recibido por parte de la Dirección General de Epidemiología, un aviso enfocado a los Centros de Salud para estar al pendiente de posibles casos importados de hantavirus y ébola. En el tema del hantavirus, es especialmente dirigido a contactos con las personas que estuvieron en el crucero que zarpó de Sudamérica. La sintomatología es muy parecida al dengue o alguna neumonía, pues empieza con fiebre, dolor de cuerpo y tos. Por su parte, la Organización Mundial de la Salud (OMS) emitió una alerta internacional por el brote de ébola en la República Democrática del Congo y Uganda, regiones afectadas históricamente por esta enfermedad. Es una afección muy contagiosa por contacto directo con secreciones de una persona enferma. Aunque en el país no se han reportado casos, ni sospechas, el sector salud no puede cerrarse ante posible escenarios, por ello se ponen en marcha acciones de prevención, principalemente en puntos de entrada como los aeropuertos. Ambas enfermedades son endémicas, han estado en circulación durante mucho tiempo en esas zonas por lo que los ante los brotes la OMS emite emergencias para poder obtener fondos y tratar las patologías.

Delhi High Court Denies Vinesh Phogat's Request to Compete in Asian Games Trials
content: Court's Decision on Vinesh Phogat's Participation On Monday, the Delhi High Court declined to provide immediate relief to wrestler Vinesh Phogat regarding her legal battle against her exclusion from the Asian Games selection trials, which was enforced by the Wrestling Federation of India (WFI). The court expressed concerns that allowing her to compete while her case is still pending could lead to irreversible consequences if her appeal is ultimately unsuccessful. Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav emphasized that the court was not inclined to issue an interim order that would enable Phogat to participate in the trials set for May 30, as her challenge to WFI’s updated selection criteria remains unresolved. The court noted that permitting her participation at this juncture, only to later deem it legally invalid, would be counterproductive and could complicate the selection process. Senior advocate Rajshekhar Rao, representing Phogat, argued that the circumstances surrounding her exclusion raised significant issues that warranted judicial review. He requested the court to allow Phogat to compete in the trials, contingent upon the outcome of her main petition. Rao pointed out that Phogat had returned to wrestling after maternity leave and claimed that WFI’s eligibility requirements were not aligned with international standards, which typically provide protections and exemptions for athletes re-entering the sport post-childbirth. He further criticized the federation for procedural unfairness, highlighting that the show-cause notice accusing Phogat of misconduct was issued just hours before a major event. Rao also contested the federation's reference to issues regarding Phogat’s disqualification at the upcoming 2024 Paris Olympics. During the proceedings, the court acknowledged the concerns related to maternity leave but also noted that broader issues regarding national sports interests and team selection criteria needed consideration. The bench indicated that a conclusive hearing could not take place before the court's vacation next month and scheduled the next hearing for July 6. A notice was issued regarding Phogat’s challenge against WFI’s new selection policy and the circular governing the Asian Games trials. The court allowed Phogat to submit a detailed response to the show-cause notice from the federation and instructed WFI to complete the disciplinary proceedings before the next hearing date. Any final decisions made by the federation must also be...

Comprar muebles grandes online: qué revisar para no arrepentirse después
content: Antes de renovar el living durante una fecha de descuentos, no basta con mirar el precio. Medidas, despacho, materialidad y condiciones de cambio pueden hacer la diferencia entre una buena compra y un problema difícil de resolver. Renovar la casa por internet puede ser cómodo, rápido y conveniente, pero cuando se trata de muebles grandes la decisión exige un poco más de calma. No es lo mismo comprar un accesorio pequeño que elegir un sofá, una mesa o un mueble que debe entrar por la puerta, calzar en el espacio disponible y resistir el uso diario. En fechas de alta demanda online, la presión por decidir rápido puede llevar a pasar por alto detalles simples. El color puede verse distinto en pantalla, el despacho puede encarecer el total y una medida mal calculada puede transformar una compra atractiva en una complicación. Por eso, antes de llenar el carro virtual, conviene mirar la compra como un proceso completo. El precio importa, pero no es el único dato que debería pesar. La planificación empieza antes de mirar descuentos En eventos masivos como cyber day , muchas personas revisan categorías completas en poco tiempo y comparan productos con la idea de encontrar una buena oportunidad. El problema aparece cuando la decisión se toma solo por el porcentaje de descuento y no por las condiciones reales de la compra. SERNAC suele recomendar revisar información clave antes de pagar en compras online, como precio final, características del producto, condiciones de despacho y políticas de cambios o devoluciones. También recuerda que los derechos del consumidor aplican en el comercio electrónico, al igual que en una compra presencial. Una buena práctica es anotar con anticipación qué se necesita realmente. Por ejemplo, si el living requiere más asientos, un mueble fácil de limpiar o una pieza que no bloquee la circulación. Esa lista ayuda a filtrar mejor y evita caer en compras impulsivas. Medir bien es más importante de lo que parece Uno de los errores más comunes al comprar muebles grandes por internet es mirar solo el ancho. Para que un mueble funcione en la casa, también hay que revisar fondo, alto, espacio de apertura, circulación y accesos. Antes de elegir un sillón , conviene medir el lugar donde irá instalado y también el trayecto que hará hasta llegar ahí. Puertas, pasillos, escaleras y ascensores pueden convertirse en un problema si no se consideran antes. También ayuda dejar un margen libre alrededor del mueble. En...

Pumas vs Cruz Azul: Conoce las fechas, horarios y sedes de la Gran Final de la Liga MX
content: La Liga MX ya tiene definida la serie que decidirá al campeón del Clausura 2026 . Pumas y Cruz Azul disputarán una Final con historia, rivalidad reciente y dos equipos que llegan con la necesidad de terminar sequías importantes en el futbol mexicano. Después de eliminar a Pachuca y Chivas en semifinales, respectivamente, universitarios y celestes volverán a enfrentarse en una serie por el título que también tendrá un ingrediente especial: será una Final completamente capitalina, con partidos programados en dos estadios de la Ciudad de México. La información sobre las fechas, horarios y sedes oficiales de la Final del Clausura 2026 fue publicada tras la confirmación de ambos clubes como finalistas del torneo. ¡LA GRAN FINAL ESTÁ LISTA! 🏆🤩 Universitarios y Celestes están en la última instancia para luchar por la gloria en #LaFiestaDeLaAfición . 🔥 ¡La batalla por el título está cerca! ⚽️ #ConMéxicoC26 pic.twitter.com/ZnbWx5aO9d — Liga BBVA MX (@LigaBBVAMX) May 18, 2026 TE PUEDE INTERESAR: ¿Cuándo fue la última vez que Pumas y Cruz Azul se enfrentaron en una final del futbol mexicano? Cruz Azul regresa al Estadio Ciudad de los Deportes Uno de los temas que más expectativa generó antes de la confirmación de la Final fue la sede que utilizaría Cruz Azul para el partido de Ida. Finalmente, La Máquina decidió regresar al Estadio Ciudad de los Deportes , inmueble conocido por gran parte de la afición celeste como el “Estadio Azul”. View this post on Instagram Con este movimiento, la Final se disputará completamente en la Ciudad de México, algo que no ocurría en una serie entre ambos clubes desde hace varias décadas. En el caso de Pumas, el club universitario acumula 15 años sin ganar un título de Liga y también 15 años sin levantar cualquier otro trofeo oficial. La última vez que Universidad Nacional fue campeón ocurrió en el Clausura 2011. Por su parte, Cruz Azul buscará terminar una sequía más corta. La Máquina no conquista la Liga MX desde el Guard1anes 2021 , torneo en el que consiguió la décima estrella de su historia. View this post on Instagram ¿Cuándo se juega la Final entre Pumas y Cruz Azul? La Liga MX confirmó oficialmente las fechas y horarios para los dos partidos de la Final del Clausura 2026. El encuentro de Ida se jugará el jueves 21 de mayo en el Estadio Ciudad de los Deportes, mientras que la Vuelta se disputará el domingo 24 de mayo en el Estadio Olímpico Universitario. Final de Ida Día: Jueves...

Elon Musk Has Lost Case Against OpenAI ’s Sam Altman, Judge Rules Lawsuit ‘Bears No Relationship to Reality’
content: A nine-member bench in Oakland, California, on Monday threw out SpaceX and Tesla CEO Elon Musk’s high-profile lawsuit against OpenAI, claiming mistreatment by OpenAI’s founders. In a unanimous verdict, the bench ruled that the tech billionaire’s claims were filed well past the legal deadline and declared Altman, OpenAI and its president, Greg Brockman, not liable for Elon Musk’s claims. Musk had accused Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Microsoft, and OpenAI of effectively “stealing a charity” by pivoting the frontier artificial intelligence lab toward a highly lucrative, for-profit commercial affiliate. However, the jury determined that any alleged harms or breaches of contract Musk experienced occurred long before the legal window to file a lawsuit had closed. What Did the Court Rule? Despite several weeks of high-stakes testimony from Silicon Valley’s most influential figures in the case, detailing the melodramatic history of OpenAI’s founding, the courtroom finally hinged on a narrow statutory technicality. The court found that Musk’s lawsuit, which was filed in 2024, did not fall within the statute of limitations to bring his case against OpenAI.“There was a substantial amount of evidence to support the jury’s finding, which is why I was prepared to dismiss on the spot,” Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers said after the verdict was delivered. The defence argued that the statute of limitations had expired, proving that the alleged broken promises and organisational shifts took place prior to key cutoff dates between 2021 and 2022. OpenAI established that Musk was aware of the company’s structural changes years before seeking legal recourse, and the jury reached a swift consensus, concluding that Musk’s claims were legally invalid. “It did not take [the jury] two hours to conclude that Mr Musk’s lawsuit is nothing more than an after-the-fact contrivance that bears no relationship to reality,” OpenAI’s lead attorney, Bill Savitt, reportedly stated after the verdict. “They kicked it exactly where it belongs, just to the side. This lawsuit is a hypocritical attempt to sabotage a competitor,” he added. Courtroom Reaction Following the reading of the verdict, the legal teams from both sides delivered contrasting interpretations of the outcome outside the Oakland federal courthouse. OpenAI’s lead attorney, William Savitt, lauded the decision, emphasising that the jury had painstakingly weighed hundreds of pieces of evidence and absorbed weeks of dense testimony before...

وزير الصحة في الكونغو يعلن عن إنشاء 3 مراكز لعلاج الإيبولا وسط استمرار تفشي المرض
content: داكار، السنغال — أعلن وزير الصحة في الكونغو، عن افتتاح ثلاثة مراكز علاجية في منطقة إيتوري الشرقية، في الوقت الذي تكافح فيه البلاد تفشي شكل نادر من فيروس الإيبولا الذي لا يوجد علاج أو لقاح معتمد له. وقال صامويل روجر كامبا يوم الأحد خلال زيارة إلى بونيا في العاصمة وأكبر مدينة في إيتوري: “نعلم أن المستشفيات تعاني بالفعل من الضغط بسبب المرضى”. “لكننا نستعد لإنشاء مراكز علاج في المواقع الثلاثة لنتمكن من توسيع قدرتنا”. أعلنت منظمة الصحة العالمية تفشي الإيبولا أ الصحة العامة ضرورية وهو أمر يثير قلقا دوليا بعد تسجيل أكثر من 300 حالة مشتبه بها و88 حالة وفاة في الكونجو وحالتين في أوغندا المجاورة. وعلى الرغم من أن تفشي المرض يتركز في إيتوري، فقد تم الإبلاغ عن حالات في العاصمة كينشاسا وغوما، أكبر مدن شرق الكونغو. وقال مكتب منظمة الصحة العالمية الإقليمي لأفريقيا في إكسا إن فريقا من 35 خبيرا من منظمة الصحة العالمية ووزارة الصحة الكونغولية وصل إلى بونيا، عاصمة مقاطعة إيتوري، ومعه 7 أطنان من الإمدادات والمعدات الطبية الطارئة. الإيبولا شديد العدوى ويمكن أن تنتقل عن طريق سوائل الجسم مثل القيء أو الدم أو السائل المنوي. والمرض الذي يسببه نادر ولكنه خطير ومميت في كثير من الأحيان. تقول السلطات الصحية الفاشيات الحالية الأول، الذي تم تأكيده يوم الجمعة، ناجم عن فيروس بونديبوغيو، وهو شكل نادر من الإيبولا ليس له علاج أو لقاح معتمد. وعلى الرغم من حدوث أكثر من 20 حالة تفشي للإيبولا في الكونغو وأوغندا، إلا أن هذه هي المرة الثالثة التي يتم فيها التعرف على فيروس بونديبوجيو. وقال الدكتور غابرييل نساكالا، أستاذ الصحة العامة الذي شارك في الاستجابات لتفشي فيروس إيبولا في الكونغو في السابق، إن علاج الالتهابات الفيروسية مثل الإيبولا غالبًا ما يسترشد بالأعراض. وقال إن الكونغو تتمتع بخبرة واسعة في إدارة تفشي فيروس إيبولا، لكن جهود الاستجابة قد تكون معقدة بسبب السلالة غير العادية. تم التعرف على فيروس بونديبوجيو لأول مرة في منطقة بونديبوغيو في أوغندا أثناء تفشي المرض في الفترة 2007-2008 والذي أصاب 149 شخصًا وقتل 37 آخرين. وكانت المرة الثانية في عام 2012، خلال تفشي المرض في إيسيرو، الكونغو، حيث كانت هناك 57 حالة و29 حالة وفاة. وقال المركز الأفريقي لمكافحة الأمراض والوقاية منها إن الحالات الأولى تم الإبلاغ عنها في منطقة مونغوالو الصحية، وهي منطقة تعدين كثيفة المرور في إيتوري. تقع إيتوري في الجزء الشرقي النائي من الكونغو، حيث الطرق سيئة، وتبعد أكثر من 1000 كيلومتر (620 ميل) عن عاصمة البلاد كينشاسا. ويواجه شرق الكونغو أزمة إنسانية حتى قبل تأكيد تفشي المرض الجديد. وقالت الوكالة إن هناك خطر انتشار المرض بشكل أكبر بسبب التحركات السكانية المكثفة والهجمات التي تشنها الجماعات المسلحة والتي أسفرت عن مقتل العشرات ونزوح الآلاف في...

title: Rajasthan United FC Set to Face Chanmari FC in Indian Football League Showdown
content: Match Preview: Rajasthan United vs. Chanmari FC New Delhi [India], May 18: In an exciting conclusion to the Indian Football League 2025-26, Rajasthan United FC will take on Chanmari FC at the Namdhari Football Stadium in Sri Bhaini Sahib this Tuesday. The match is slated to begin at 18:30 IST and will be available for live viewing on DD Sports and Sony Sports Network, with streaming options on Waves and Sony LIV, as per the announcement. Currently, Rajasthan holds the fourth position in the league with 17 points, unable to advance further as they trail third-placed Sreenidi Deccan by eight points. In contrast, Chanmari still has a chance to enhance their standing. The team from Mizoram is in sixth place with 14 points, tied with Dempo SC. A win on Tuesday would elevate them to 17 points, potentially allowing them to surpass Rajasthan due to a better head-to-head record. In their previous encounter during the group stage, Rajasthan United emerged victorious with a 2-0 scoreline, thanks to goals from Pangambam Naoba Meitei and Amadou Soukouna. While the match may not significantly impact the title race, both teams are motivated to finish strong after challenging Championship Phase campaigns. With less pressure, fans can expect an entertaining match as both sides aim to showcase their attacking prowess. Both teams are coming off losses in their last matches, with Rajasthan suffering a 2-4 defeat to Shillong Lajong FC, while Chanmari narrowly lost 1-2 to Sreenidi Deccan. This match offers Rajasthan another chance to secure their first win of the championship phase after a tough series of results. The Desert Warriors have displayed moments of brilliance in their attack throughout the season and will strive for a more cohesive performance in this crucial fixture. Gerard Artigas has been a standout player for Rajasthan, netting four goals this season and is expected to spearhead their attack once more. Meitei has also been a consistent contributor with two goals and two assists, while Thomyo Shimray's movement and work rate will be vital in creating scoring opportunities. Defensively, Abdul Samed Ango and Shafeel PP will need to ensure a solid backline. On the other hand, Chanmari will be motivated by the chance to climb the standings in the final matches of the season. Despite some inconsistent performances, they have remained competitive and are eager to finish the season on a high note. Lalruatsanga is Chanmari's key attacking player, having scored four goals...

title: Ghanaian attacker Emmanuel Avornyo makes matchday 32 Team of the Week in North Macedonia
content: Ghanaian attacker Emmanuel Avornyo is making headlines in North Macedonia after delivering another impressive performance in the Macedonian top flight, earning a place in the Matchday 32 Team of the Week.The forward produced a standout display for KF Bashkimi in their entertaining 2-2 draw against Makedonija GP, where his influence in attack proved decisive throughout the match.Avornyo's performance stood out for his sharp movement, attacking intent, and consistent threat in the final third as Bashkimi battled to secure a point in a tightly contested encounter.His efforts were duly recognised at the end of the matchday, earning a deserved spot in the Matchday 32 Team of the Weekan acknowledgement of his growing impact since moving to the league.The Ghanaian forward's form continues to attract attention, with his recent performances suggesting increasing confidence and adaptation to European football.His contribution against Makedonija GP further strengthens his reputation as one of Bashkimi's key attacking options.As the season progresses, Avornyo will be aiming to build on this momentum and continue delivering consistent performances for his side in North Macedonia.

title: 2005 BMW 645Ci Convertible Sport 6-Speed at No Reserve
content: This 2005 BMW 645Ci convertible has 57k miles and was optioned with the Sport and Cold Weather packages. Finished in Black over matching Dakota leather, the car is powered by a 4.4-liter V8 paired with a six-speed manual gearbox. Equipment includes a black soft top, adaptive xenon headlights, Park Distance Control, 19′′ Style 121 alloy wheels, Active Steering, auto-dimming mirrors, heated power-adjustable front sport seats, dual-zone automatic climate control, a head-up display, a CD-changer stereo, and iDrive with navigation. The vehicle was sold on BaT in April 2021 and again the following November , and it was acquired by the selling dealer in April 2026. This E64 645Ci convertible is offered with owner’s manuals, two keys, service records, a clean Carfax report, and a clean Pennsylvania title. The car is finished in Black (668) with Shadowline trim and is equipped with a color-matched soft top that features a heated glass rear window. Additional details include adaptive xenon headlights with washers along with auto-dimming side mirrors, Park Distance Control sensors, and dual exhaust outlets with polished finishers. A video highlighting imperfections is viewable in the gallery below, as are photos showing paint-meter readings. Silver-finished 19′′ Style 121 alloy wheels were mounted with 245/50 front and 275/35 rear Yokohama Advan Sport A/S+ tires in February 2025. The car is equipped with Active Steering, and braking is provided by four-wheel ventilated discs. The heated power-adjustable front sport seats, along with the contoured two-place rear bench, are upholstered in black Dakota leather. Wood trim accents the interior, which is further appointed with dual-zone automatic climate control, an auto-dimming rearview mirror, adaptive cruise control, a CD-changer stereo, and iDrive with navigation. A replacement BMW safety gateway module (SGM), amplifier, and a 10-amp fuse were fitted in May 2025, and a July 2025 invoice notes that the radio volume knob does not work consistently. The heated sport steering wheel frames a 160-mph speedometer and a tachometer with a 6,500-rpm redline as well as gauges for oil temperature and fuel level. The car is equipped with a head-up display. The digital odometer indicates 57k miles, approximately 50 of which were added under current ownership. The 4.4-liter N62B44 V8 features double-VANOS variable valve timing and was factory rated at 325 horsepower and 330 lb-ft of torque. The fuel vapor leak-detection pump was...

title: Letter to the editor | Ruiz: Three leaders for Oregon’s education system
content: Oregon’s education funding conversation is reaching a critical point. Families are stretched thin, educators are exhausted, and districts across our state are making painful cuts that directly impact students and classrooms. These are difficult and urgent conversations, and they require leaders who are willing to listen, collaborate, and build real solutions alongside the people most affected. That’s why I’m proud to support Janeen Sollman, Daniel Nguyen, and Susan McLain. As Co-Chair of the Joint Ways and Means Subcommittee on Education, Janeen Sollman brings steady leadership and a deep understanding of what schools are facing. Her experience as a former Hillsboro school board member and parent of teachers keeps her grounded in the realities educators and families live every day. Rep. Daniel Nguyen understands that strong schools and strong economic development must go hand in hand. As chair of the House Committee on Economic Development, Small Business, and Trade, he recognizes that investing in education is also investing in Oregon’s workforce, future, and long-term economic stability. Rep. Susan McLain brings the invaluable perspective of an educator. She understands this work at a deeper level because she has lived it, and she continues to center students, educators, and families in the conversations happening in Salem. We need leaders who will bring educators directly into the process and move Oregon forward together. Ricki Ruiz Gresham Ricki Ruiz (D) represents District 50 in the Oregon State House of Representatives.

title: Mientras en México la pobreza se refleja en techos de lámina y colonias sin servicios, en Corea del Sur los hogares vulnerables viven con infraestructura moderna, pero con bajos ingresos, empleos inestables y una fuerte precariedad entre adultos mayores
content: Comparar la pobreza entre México y Corea del Sur en 2026 implica observar dos modelos muy distintos de vulnerabilidad. En México, la pobreza sigue ligada a carencias sociales y desigualdad territorial. En Corea del Sur, la pobreza suele ser menos visible en infraestructura, pero se refleja en ingreso limitado, presión laboral y una fuerte precariedad entre adultos mayores. De acuerdo con el Instituto Nacional de Estadística y Geografía ( INEGI ), el 29.6% de la población mexicana vivía en pobreza en 2024 , bajo una medición multidimensional. En Corea del Sur, datos de la Organización para la Cooperación y el Desarrollo Económicos ( OCDE ) muestran que el país mantiene una de las tasas más altas de pobreza relativa entre adultos mayores dentro del organismo, superando el 38% en personas de 66 años o más. ¿La pobreza en México realmente está bajando? Sí, según los datos oficiales más recientes. El gobierno de la presidenta Claudia Sheinbaum ha destacado que: La pobreza pasó de 41.9% en 2018 a 29.6% en 2024 Millones de personas salieron de esta condición La pobreza extrema también disminuyó El descenso se relaciona con: Incremento al salario mínimo Programas sociales Mayor formalización laboral Recuperación del empleo Sin embargo, los reportes oficiales también muestran que: Persisten carencias en salud y seguridad social Continúa la desigualdad regional La informalidad laboral sigue siendo elevada Esto significa que la pobreza sí va a la baja, pero mantiene problemas estructurales importantes . De acuerdo con el Instituto Nacional de Estadística y Geografía (INEGI), el 29.6% de la población mexicana vivía en pobreza en 2024, bajo una medición multidimensional. Te puede interesar: Mientras en México la pobreza se refleja en techos de lámina y colonias sin servicios, en Francia los hogares vulnerables viven con salud y servicios garantizados, pero con rentas altas y dificultad para sostener el nivel de vida ¿Cómo se mide la pobreza en México? En México, la pobreza es multidimensional. Una persona es considerada en pobreza si: Tiene ingreso insuficiente Presenta al menos una carencia social Las principales carencias incluyen: Salud Educación Seguridad social Vivienda Servicios básicos Alimentación Por eso, en algunas regiones del país, la pobreza puede reflejarse en: Viviendas con materiales precarios Colonias con infraestructura incompleta Trabajo informal Acceso limitado a servicios ¿Cómo se mide la pobreza en...

content: MIAMI GARDENS, FLORIDA - JANUARY 19: Head coach Mario Cristobal of the Miami Hurricanes looks on prior to a game against the Indiana Hoosiers in the 2026 College Football Playoff National Championship at Hard Rock Stadium on January 19, 2026 in Miami Gardens, Florida. (Photo by Alex Slitz/Getty Images) | Getty Images Happy Monday, everybody. Hope your weeks have gotten off to a good start. Without further ado, let’s get into it... 1) It wasn’t a perfect week for Miami Hurricanes recruiting by any means. A big target, literally and figuratively, in their own back yard got away from them in five-star St. Thomas Aquinas OT Mark Matthews, who pulled the trigger with Texas A&M. Five-star Chicago (St. Patrick) DL David Folorunsho also picked Notre Dame over Miami. I’m sure many of you all saw the Matthews commitment video. If not, well, there you go. 5 Star OL Mark Matthews commits to Texas A&M! Alot of energy during this commitment. pic.twitter.com/vCxRDSuTbc — Grant Reacts (@GrantReacts1) May 15, 2026 A tough loss, but that’s ‘crootin. It’s hard to get them all, but with the success that Miami has shown to have in developing their top offensive lineman over the last three years, and with how competitive Miami is in NIL, this was a tough one to swallow. 2) Former Miami Hurricanes director of recruiting Pop Cooney, now with A&M, had something to say about it as well. Walk in yo trap take over yo trap — Pop Cooney (@CoachPop_Cooney) May 15, 2026 Um....ABOUT THAT... TRUE FRESHMAN BRYCE FITZGERALD CALLED GAME🙌 pic.twitter.com/egG3NvPMLc — PFF College (@PFF_College) December 20, 2025 Seems a little bit more relevant and important. But anyways, where was I... 3 ) Despite all that, boy, Mario Cristobal had himself a nice Sunday, and part of it came at the expense of his old school. He secured the commitment flip of 2027 four-star Dothan, AL CB Ai’King Hall from the Oregon Ducks. Mohammedan Sporting Club Faces NorthEast United FC in Final ISL Clash
content: Final Showdown in ISL 2025-26 Guwahati (Assam) [India], May 18: Mohammedan Sporting Club is set to play for pride as they face NorthEast United FC in their concluding match of the Indian Super League (ISL) 2025-26 at the Indira Gandhi Athletic Stadium on Tuesday. Following a heavy 0-4 loss to Mumbai City FC, Mohammedan Sporting Club has officially been relegated from the ISL, marking them as the first team to drop out this season. The Black and White Brigade, which fielded an all-Indian squad throughout the season, finds themselves at the bottom of the league table with a mere three points from 12 matches, having failed to secure a single victory. They are determined to conclude the season on a high note with a win. Conversely, NorthEast United FC, who kicked off the season by successfully defending their Durand Cup title, struggled to maintain that momentum in the ISL. Currently, they sit in 10th place with 13 points, having achieved three wins, four draws, and five losses, and they are eager to finish their campaign positively. Mohammedan SC, which earned its place in the ISL after clinching the 2023-24 I-League title, has only managed to stay in the top tier for two seasons. They will now prepare for the 2026-27 Indian Football League, aiming for a swift return to the ISL. The last encounter between these teams at this venue in January 2025 ended in a stalemate, while NorthEast United FC narrowly defeated Mohammedan SC 1-0 in the previous match in Kolkata, with Alaaeddine Ajaraie netting the decisive goal. Mehrajuddin Wadoo, head coach of Mohammedan SC, urged his players to give their all in the final match, stating, “They have been working very hard in training sessions and in all the games, despite having their limited resources. I expect them to give their best in the next game as well.” Regarding NorthEast, Wadoo acknowledged their strength at home, saying, “It’s going to be a difficult challenge for us. But this game is the last game, and we want to give our best and finish the league with a win.” Throughout the season, Mohammedan SC has faced challenges, scoring only seven goals while conceding 30. NorthEast United FC also has a negative goal difference of -3, with 12 goals scored and 15 conceded. NorthEast United's head coach, Juan Pedro Benali, emphasized the importance of their final match, stating, “The most important thing is to do the best in the last game because everybody remembers you for the last game. Football has a very short memory,...

title: Lagos government cautions consumers against buying rotten tomatoes
content: The Lagos State Government has warned residents against buying or consuming spoiled tomatoes, popularly known as “Ata Esha,” over the health dangers associated with fungus-infested food products. The warning was issued through the Lagos State Consumer Protection Agency, LASCOPA, which advised consumers to avoid tomatoes with visible white, green or black fungal growth. The General Manager of the agency, Afolabi Solebo, said fungi found on rotten tomatoes could produce dangerous toxins, including aflatoxins, which may cause serious health conditions such as liver damage and other related illnesses. According to him, contaminated tomatoes remain harmful even after cooking, boiling or frying, as the toxins may not be completely destroyed by heat. “a healthy person is determined by what he or she consumes from time to time,” Solebo said. He emphasised that consumers should not compromise their health and safety because of the lower prices of spoiled food items sold in the markets. The LASCOPA boss also urged Lagos residents to properly examine food items before buying them and avoid visibly mouldy or contaminated tomatoes and other food products. He further advised consumers to safely dispose of spoiled food items and report the sale of unsafe, expired or contaminated products to government agencies responsible for public health, environmental safety and consumer protection. Solebo noted that consumers have rights as well as responsibilities, including being properly informed about products and services, speaking out against unfair practices and making environmentally responsible choices. He disclosed that monitoring and enforcement teams have already been deployed to markets across Lagos State to arrest traders involved in the sale of unsafe food products. Lagos government cautions consumers against buying rotten tomatoes

A un año del crimen de Ximena y José: Sospechas de manipulación de cámaras nublan el caso
content: En dos días se cumple un año del asesinato de Ximena Guzmán y José Muñoz , colaboradores de la jefa de Gobierno , y el caso sigue sin esclarecerse. Acudimos al lugar del crimen , donde nacen más preguntas sin respuesta, como la posible manipulación de cámaras de seguridad días previos al doble asesinato. Las flores se marchitan en el lugar de su último respiro. A unos días de que se cumpla un año del asesinato de Ximena Guzmán , secretaria particular de la jefa de Gobierno de la CDMX, Clara Brugada, y José Muñoz, su asesor, no se saben más que obviedades. De acuerdo con el secretario de Seguridad Ciudadana de la CDMX , Pablo Vázquez Camacho, una parte sustancial de esta operación fue ejecutada por integrantes de un grupo delictivo identificado con operaciones en la Ciudad de México y el Estado de México . El ataque ocurrió la mañana del 20 de mayo del 2025 sobre Calzada de Tlalpan , de sur a norte, a la altura del Metro Xola , cuando Ximena Guzmán se detuvo para recoger a José en el punto exacto donde ya los estaban esperando para ejecutarlos. El misterio de las cámaras: Averías sospechosas y presunta manipulación Por estas escaleras que están a la altura de Tlalpan, en el sentido de sur a norte, lo recogió Ximena. En ese lugar fue justo donde se encontraba el auto donde fueron acribillados ambos . Hoy ya hay jardineras, ya no hay paso más que de bicicletas y de motos, y permanecen pancartas donde la familia y amigos acuden a rezar para recordarlos. Vecinos, amigos o familia han convertido el lugar del crimen en un altar lleno de flores y pancartas exigiendo justicia . De acuerdo con testimonios de los vecinos, han venido como tres o cuatro veces a dejar flores y a hacer oración, pues apenas hace una semana asistieron al sitio. Justo abajo del lugar de los hechos hay un puente peatonal subterráneo de Tlalpan lleno de locales comerciales. Como parte de una cobertura especial de Geraldine Aragón para Azteca Noticias , se constató que la mañana del asesinato José caminó por este bajo puente a la altura del Metro Xola . En la zona se observan locatarios y puestos que estaban cerrados en ese momento, pero una cámara privada captó su trayecto. Al respecto, Marisol, locataria y vecina del lugar, confirmó que los policías de investigación acudieron posteriormente por la memoria interna de su dispositivo de seguridad y se la llevaron. 300 días de impunidad: ¿Quiénes son los responsables del asesinato de los colaboradores...

title: West Bengal Govt sets up panels to probe violence against women, institutional graft
content: The West Bengal Government on Monday constituted two inquiry committees to investigate allegations of institutional corruption and violence against women. Addressing a press conference in Kolkata, Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari said that the panels would be headed by retired judges of the Calcutta High Court and both the committees would begin their work from June 1. The first committee, tasked with examining financial irregularities and alleged ‘cut money’ and institutional corruption, will be headed by retired Justice Biswajit Basu. Senior IPS officer K Jayaraman has been appointed as the member secretary of the panel. The second committee, formed to investigate allegations of violence and atrocities against women and girls, will be headed by retired Justice Samapti Chatterjee and IPS officer Damayanti Sen has been appointed as the member secretary of this commission. The CM said the panels have been constituted to ensure a detailed and impartial investigation into the allegations. He added that action should be taken against corruption linked to both the Central and state government welfare schemes, including alleged irregularities in the mid-day meal programme and the Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA).

MoCDTI Rejects Misappropriation Claims Against Minister George
content: NewsGhana, Latest Updates and Breaking News of Ghana, News Ghana, https://www.newsghana.com.gh/mocdti-rejects-misappropriation-claims-against-minister-george/ Ghana’s Ministry of Communication, Digital Technology and Innovations has rejected social media claims that sector minister Samuel Nartey George misappropriated public funds, describing the allegations as inaccurate and misleading. In a press release, the Ministry of Communication, Digital Technology and Innovations (MoCDTI) said the document circulating online had been taken out of context and misrepresented. The ministry clarified that the document is an extract from a broader official submission seeking commitment authorisation from the Ministry of Finance, describing it as a standard step within Ghana’s public financial management and procurement procedures. The ministry stressed that the submission is anchored in budgetary allocations already approved by Parliament for the 2026 fiscal year and has not yet received approval from the Ministry of Finance. It confirmed that no funds have been released, disbursed or spent in connection with any projects or activities referenced in the document. The ministry urged the public to treat the circulating claims “with the contempt they deserve,” maintaining that they bear no relation to the actual status of the financial process. MoCDTI said the submission covers a range of planned initiatives, including projects, operational activities and programme interventions scheduled for the 2026 fiscal year, all of which remain at a preliminary stage subject to standard administrative approvals before any government expenditure can occur. The ministry reaffirmed its commitment to transparency and accountability, assuring the public that all financial activities under its mandate are conducted in strict compliance with public finance regulations. The denial comes on a day of heightened scrutiny for the communications sector, with Minister George earlier facing a sharp exchange at a Public Accounts Committee sitting over questions about telecom service quality and governance in the sector. NewsGhana, Latest Updates and Breaking News of Ghana, News Ghana, https://www.newsghana.com.gh/mocdti-rejects-misappropriation-claims-against-minister-george/

title: Uzodimma, Mbata Win APC Senatorial Primaries In Imo
content: The All Progressives Congress (APC), has declared Governor Hope Uzodimma and Prince Alex Mbata as winners of its senatorial primaries in Imo State ahead of the 2027 general elections. The chairman of the APC House of Representatives Primary Elections Committee for Senate, Rear Admiral Kayode Williams (rtd), announced the results on Monday in Owerri. He declared Uzodimma winner of the Imo West Senatorial District primary after polling 230,464 votes, defeating former Governor Rochas Okorocha, who scored 1,098 votes. Williams said Uzodimma satisfied all requirements of the party and the electoral guidelines, adding that he recorded the highest number of valid votes in the contest. The APC returning officer also confirmed that Senator Osita Izunaso stepped down from the race after earlier obtaining a nomination form to seek re-election. In Imo East Senatorial District, Prince Alex Mbata was also declared winner after polling 121,680 votes. His closest challenger, Dr Chijioke Kaduru, had earlier withdrawn from the race before the conclusion of the primary. Meanwhile, results from Imo North Senatorial District were still being awaited at the time of filing this report, with Senator Ifeanyi Araraume and Senator Patrick Ndubueze contesting for the ticket. The primaries were conducted across the state under party supervision, with officials describing the exercise as orderly and largely peaceful.

Gabon/32e Assemblée régionale Afrique de l’APF : le président de l’Assemblée nationale représente le pays à Dakar
content: LIBREVILLE, 18 mai 2026 (AGP) – Le président de l’Assemblée nationale et président de la section gabonaise de l’Assemblée parlementaire de la Francophonie (APF), Michel Régis Onanga M. Ndiaye, représente le Gabon à la 32e Assemblée régionale Afrique de l’APF, dont la cérémonie d’ouverture s’est tenue ce lundi à Dakar, au Sénégal, rapporte un communiqué de l’institution. Placées sous le thème « La Francophonie parlementaire face aux défis du développement durable et de la démocratie en Afrique », ces assises visent notamment à réformer et moderniser l’APF afin de l’adapter aux exigences actuelles et de répondre aux attentes des peuples, en particulier ceux d’Afrique francophone. Le président de l’Assemblée nationale conduit une délégation pluraliste composée de parlementaires issus des deux chambres. Selon le communiqué, « cette délégation pluraliste renforce inéluctablement la crédibilité et illustre la volonté des autorités de porter une voix collective, cohérente et représentative au sein des différentes instances de l’APF ». La participation du Parlement gabonais à ce rendez‐vous majeur du donner et du recevoir témoigne de sa volonté de renforcer son rôle au sein des instances parlementaires internationales et de contribuer activement aux réflexions sur l’avenir de la Francophonie parlementaire. La rencontre réunit des délégations parlementaires venues d’Afrique et d’autres régions, autour des enjeux politiques, institutionnels et démocratiques qui traversent aujourd’hui l’espace francophone africain. JDMB/TYM/CBM/EN/AGP L’article Gabon/32e Assemblée régionale Afrique de l’APF : le président de l’Assemblée nationale représente le pays à Dakar est apparu en premier sur AGP - Agence Gabonaise de Presse .

title: Croatia Unveils 26-Man Squad for 2026 FIFA World Cup with Luka Modric as Captain
content: Croatia's Squad Announcement for the 2026 FIFA World Cup Zagreb [Croatia], May 18: On Monday, Croatia's head coach Zlatko Dalic revealed a 26-player roster for the upcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup, with the seasoned midfielder Luka Modric set to lead the team as captain. This marks Croatia's seventh participation in the FIFA World Cup, and the team aims to build on its strong performances in previous tournaments. Croatia was the runner-up in the 2018 World Cup, losing to France in the final, and secured third place in the 2022 tournament, matching their debut performance in 1998. At 40 years old, Modric, often hailed as one of the finest midfielders of his era, remains a pivotal figure in the Croatian lineup. He holds the record for the most international caps for Croatia, with 196 appearances, and is a former Ballon d'Or winner. The squad also features experienced players such as Ivan Perisic, Mario Pasalic, and Andrej Kramaric, while defender Josko Gvardiol makes a return after recovering from a broken shin sustained earlier this year. Croatia's goalkeeping trio includes Dominik Livakovic, Dominik Kotarski, and Ivor Pandur. The defensive lineup comprises Gvardiol, Duje Caleta-Car, Josip Sutalo, Josip Stanisic, Marin Pongracic, Martin Erlic, and Luka Vuskovic. In midfield, alongside Modric, Croatia has Mateo Kovacic, Mario Pasalic, Nikola Vlasic, Luka Sucic, Martin Baturina, Kristijan Jakic, Petar Sucic, Nikola Moro, and Toni Fruk. The attack will be spearheaded by Perisic, Kramaric, and Ante Budimir, with Marco Pasalic, Petar Musa, and Igor Matanovic also included in the squad. Croatia secured their spot in the 2026 FIFA World Cup by topping their qualifying group, finishing ahead of Czechia, the Faroe Islands, Montenegro, and Gibraltar. Dalic's team won seven out of eight matches, with their only slip being a goalless draw against Czechia. During the qualification campaign, Croatia scored 26 goals while conceding just four. They confirmed their qualification on November 14, 2025, with a 3-1 victory over the Faroe Islands in Rijeka, where Gvardiol, Petar Musa, and Nikola Vlasic found the net. Kramaric was the standout scorer for Croatia in qualifying, netting six goals. Croatia has been placed in Group L for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which will be co-hosted by the USA, Mexico, and Canada. They will kick off their campaign against England on June 17 in Arlington, Texas, followed by a match against Panama in Toronto on June 22, and concluding the group stage...

Plataformas de games podem ser usadas para práticas de cibercrimes
content: As plataformas de jogos online, como Discord e Roblox, que já estiveram no centro da polêmica por expor crianças e adolescentes a crimes, também podem abrir espaço para jovens se tornarem os próprios criminosos. O alerta é de Sérgio Luiz Oliveira do Santos, delegado de repressão a crimes cibernéticos de Pernambuco e que pesquisa cibersegurança no Centro de Estudos e Sistemas Avançados do Recife (CESAR). Segundo ele, o ambiente dos jogos online pode funcionar como uma incubadora para práticas de cibercrimes. “Os jovens começam com tentativas de trapacear ou piratear jogos e podem evoluir para fraudes bancárias ou crimes mais graves”. Dentro dos ambientes dos jogos há a venda de acessórios e habilidades virtuais, como forma de ampliar os lucros com entretenimento. “Vendendo itens como poderes e coisas do tipo”, explica Bruno Vilela, 30 anos, usuário da plataforma Discord. Ele ajuda com um exemplo: “No Counter Strike, que eu jogo, existem skins, que são artes que você pode trocar. Bruno confirma que a tentativa de trapacear nos games é comum. “Tem quem aprenda a trapacear, a roubar esses itens dentro...

Transeúntes salvan a un joven que intentaba lanzarse desde el puente de La Florida
content: Un dramático momento se vivió en horas de la tarde de este lunes en la parte alta del distribuidor La Florida, al sur de Valencia, estado Carabobo, cuando un ciudadano de aproximadamente 25 a 30 años de edad amenazó con lanzarse al vacío. El hecho ocurrió en el sentido que conduce hacia Tocuyito. De acuerdo con los reportes de testigos presenciales, el hombre se encontraba en una situación de alta crisis emocional justo en el borde de la estructura, todo esto ante la mirada desesperada de su madre, quien se encontraba en el lugar intentando persuadirlo. La tragedia vial y humana fue evitada gracias a la acción civil. Varios transeúntes y conductores que se percataron de la situación detuvieron sus vehículos de inmediato. En una rápida maniobra de distracción y fuerza colectiva, los ciudadanos lograron sujetar al joven y ponerlo a salvo en plena vía pública, un rescate que quedó registrado en videos difundidos a través de las redes sociales. Tras ser asegurado por la comunidad, el ciudadano fue resguardado hasta la llegada de las autoridades. Minutos después, comisiones de la Policía Municipal de Valencia se hicieron presentes en el sitio para tomar custodia del joven, iniciar los protocolos de contención psicológica correspondientes y brindar apoyo a los familiares. Se espera que el ciudadano sea remitido a un centro asistencial para recibir la atención médica y de salud mental necesaria tras el fuerte episodio. La entrada Transeúntes salvan a un joven que intentaba lanzarse desde el puente de La Florida se publicó primero en Diario La Calle .

“I Enjoy Disruption”: Inside Salehe Bembury’s Expansion Into Uber-Colorful Football Kits
content: When PUMA announced its partnership with Salehe Bembury two years ago, the brief was clear: The prolific sneaker designer and German sportswear giant were to “usher [in] a new era for basketball.” But the collaboration ended up becoming something far bigger. Sure, Bembury has been actively rethinking PUMA’s basketball offering, personally selecting Tyrese Haliburton to become a PUMA athlete and then creating his signature shoe, the Hali 1. (Bembury says he “recently finished designing” the Hali 2.) However, Bembury also took it upon himself to bring borderline psychedelic mesh to PUMA running shoes before moving to football, designing goalkeeper kits to be worn by PUMA’s 11 national federations during the 2026 World Cup alongside TRVL WEAR, a range of bespoke off-field gear. “This has been one of my favorite partnerships because it’s allowed me to exist in multiple spaces,” Bembury says. “I believe industrial designers have a unique ability to apply their design perspective across an extremely diverse range of projects because versatility is such an important part of the discipline. Once you establish a design language and a point of view, you can begin applying those tools to entirely new categories and problems.” In the past decade, Bembury’s design perspective — a whimsical blend of squiggly lines and bright colors — has led him to carve complex swirling patterns into Crocs clogs , re-imagine basic New Balance shoes into flaming hot statement sneakers , and launch his own line of engineered footwear with proprietary cushioning inspired by squishy kids’ toys. His newest PUMA range is different not only because it’s themed around football, but also because footwear isn’t the main focus. “True heritage and DNA are the most valuable things that any brand can possess, and both the World Cup and PUMA have an incredible amount of that,” Bembury says. “The first step in the process was honestly the most fun for me because it gave me the opportunity to research deeply. I got to study the history of the World Cup, the culture surrounding football, and PUMA’s own design archive.” Bembury was tasked with imagining what goalkeepers — the only players with a different, typically more colorful, kit than the rest of the team — would wear during football’s biggest competition. For Portugal, that meant a bright-pink kit covered in Bembury’s signature swirling lines, while Switzerland’s keepers will wear all-black accented with a grey illustration of a mountain....

Nepal Secures Crucial Win Against Scotland in World Cup Qualifier Pathway
content: Nepal's Victory Enhances World Cup Aspirations Kirtipur [Nepal], May 18: Nepal significantly bolstered their chances of qualifying for the 2027 ICC Men’s Cricket World Cup Qualifier by achieving a convincing six-wicket win over Scotland during the ICC Men’s Cricket World Cup League 2 match held in Kirtipur. This triumph propelled Nepal to the fifth position in the CWC League 2 rankings, keeping their hopes alive for a top-four finish, which is essential for advancing in the World Cup qualification process, as stated by the ICC. Scotland, after winning the toss, chose to bat first but faced challenges against Nepal’s effective bowling lineup. Lalit Rajbanshi, a left-arm spinner, excelled with impressive figures of 4/32, while leg-spinner Sandeep Lamichhane contributed with 3/47, leading to Scotland being dismissed for 194 runs. Brandon McMullen was the standout performer for Scotland, scoring a brisk 73 off 44 deliveries, with Michael English adding 51 runs. However, the team struggled to form significant partnerships due to consistent wicket losses. Nepal responded aggressively, with Kushal Bhurtel and Aasif Sheikh putting together 58 runs in just 6.3 overs. Although Scotland managed to take a few quick wickets, Ishan Pandey and captain Rohit Paudel steadied the innings with a crucial 104-run partnership. Pandey scored a steady 55 runs, while Paudel remained not out at 74, leading Nepal to a comfortable victory. Despite Mark Watt taking two late wickets, Nepal achieved their target with six wickets remaining. This win continues Nepal's strong performance in international cricket, following their successful campaign at the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup 2026, where Dipendra Singh Airee played a pivotal role in securing the team’s first World Cup victory since 2014. Nepal has maintained their good form in the ongoing home tri-series featuring Scotland, the USA, and Oman. After an initial loss to Scotland, they bounced back with wins against the USA and Scotland, achieving two victories out of three matches. Nepal's next challenge will be against the USA on May 22 as they strive for a spot in the 2027 Cricket World Cup Qualifier.

Dólar cai e volta a fechar abaixo de R$ 5,00 em dia de recuperação de emergentes
content: O dólar exibiu queda firme nesta segunda-feira, 18, devolvendo parcialmente os ganhos de mais de 3% da semana passada, e voltou a fechar abaixo da marca de R$ 5,00. Apesar das incertezas em torno dos desdobramentos do conflito entre Estados Unidos e Irã, as taxas dos Treasuries exibiram fôlego curto, o que abriu espaço para a recuperação das divisas emergentes. O real liderou os ganhos entre as moedas mais líquidas, com investidores aparando prêmios embutidos na taxa de câmbio diante da reconfiguração das expectativas para a corrida eleitoral após o “Flávio Day 2.0”. A perspectiva de estreitamento do espaço para novas reduções da taxa Selic, reforçada pelo Boletim Focus, torna muito custosa a manutenção de posições cambiais defensivas e desencoraja apostas mais contundentes contra a moeda brasileira. Após operar acima de R$ 5,00 pela maior parte do dia, o dólar acelerou o ritmo de perdas na reta final dos negócios, com a diminuição da aversão ao risco no exterior, na esteira de declarações mais amenas do presidente dos EUA, Donald Trump, em relação ao Irã. Com mínima de R$ 4,9960, fechou em baixa de 1,37%, a R$ 4,9985. A moeda norte-americana avança 0,92% em relação ao real em maio, após baixa de 4,36% em abril. No ano, as perdas são de 8,94%. As cotações do petróleo operaram em alta ao longo do dia, com o vaivém de notícias sobre a guerra no Oriente Médio. O contrato do Brent para julho fechou com avanço de 2,6%, a US$ 112,10 o barril, mas passou a operar em ligeira queda no pregão eletrônico, abaixo do nível de US$ 110 o barril, após aceno de Trump ao Irã. O republicano cancelou ataques aéreos em solo iraniano programados para a terça-feira, pretextando que há “negociações sérias” em andamento com Teerã, com expectativa de que um acordo “muito aceitável” seja alcançado. Segundo Trump, lideranças de Catar, Emirados Árabes Unidos e Arábia Saudita solicitaram aos EUA que protelassem a ofensiva militar para permitir o avanço das tratativas diplomáticas. “Essa declaração do Trump no fim do dia fez a Bolsa reduzir as perdas e o dólar aumentar o ritmo de queda no fim do pregão. Vamos continuar com essa guerra diplomática entre Irã e Estados Unidos”, afirma o superintendente do Banco Rendimento, Jacques Zylbergeld, acrescentando que, dados os riscos inflacionários decorrentes da alta do petróleo, não há espaço para o Federal Reserve reduzir os juros neste ano, mesmo sob a presidência de...

title: Atirador abre fogo dentro de mesquita nos EUA; crianças foram retiradas do local
content: Um atirador ativo abriu fogo em uma mesquita de San Diego nesta segunda-feira, 18. Segundo autoridades locais, diversas pessoas foram baleadas. À agência da notícias Associated Press (AP) , o policial Anthony Carrasco disse que moradores relataram vários tiros no Centro Islâmico de San Diego, a cerca de 14 km ao norte do centro da cidade. Não estava claro se o atirador estava do lado de fora ou dentro do prédio, ou se já havia sido capturado. O Departamento de Polícia de San Diego informou que a situação ainda está “ativa, mas controlada”. O Centro Islâmico é a maior mesquita do Condado de San Diego, de acordo com seu site. O complexo inclui a Escola Al Rashid, que, segundo a página, oferece cursos de língua árabe, estudos islâmicos e Alcorão. Imagens aéreas da TV mostraram mais de uma dúzia de crianças de mãos dadas sendo retiradas do estacionamento do local, que está cercado por dezenas de viaturas policiais. A mesquita branca fica em um bairro residencial com casas, apartamentos e centros comerciais com restaurantes e mercados do Oriente Médio. O gabinete do governador Gavin Newsom informou que ele estava sendo notificado. “Somos gratos aos socorristas que estão no local trabalhando para proteger a comunidade e pedimos a todos que sigam as orientações das autoridades locais”, publicou seu gabinete na rede social X. O site do Centro Islâmico afirma que sua missão é não apenas servir à população muçulmana, mas também “trabalhar com a comunidade em geral para servir aos menos afortunados, educar e melhorar nossa nação”. Cinco orações diárias são realizadas no local, e a mesquita trabalha com outras organizações e pessoas de todas as religiões em causas sociais.
